description_long: This object is a freestanding basketball hoop system, typically found in urban recreational areas or sports facilities. It features a large, rectangular glass backboard mounted on a sturdy, angled metal support structure, which is painted black and blue. The hoop is attached to the backboard and includes a white net, designed for standard basketball play. The base is substantial and likely weighted, providing stability and preventing tipping during use. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a robust frame suitable for outdoor or indoor environments. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to weather and frequent use.
description: A modern, freestanding basketball hoop system with a rectangular glass backboard, metal support frame, and a white net. The structure is robust, painted in black and blue, and designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the backboard and the central support structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled metal support arms, the depth of the base, and the projection of the hoop.
description_view_2: Direct view of the backboard and hoop, clearly displaying the rectangular glass backboard and net.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the support structure and base from the other side.
